sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not provide immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Plevum Partners announces $7.9B share buyback program

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
